name: Pricing: 14-Day Starter
usage: Displayed at the top of the 14-day starter pricing card on a light cream (#FFFDF7) background. The image should feel approachable and minimal — 'let me just try this.' It contrasts with the 30-day card which feels more abundant and committed. Displayed at approximately 16:9 landscape, inside a rounded card, about 400px wide, 200px tall.
prompt: A single zesty supplement shot bottle standing upright on a light linen napkin or cloth, casually but intentionally placed on a clean cream-white surface. Beside the bottle on the cloth: a small ceramic bowl containing a lemon wedge and a small piece of fresh ginger root. The composition is intentionally minimal and sparse — lots of negative space, only three objects besides the cloth. Soft diffused morning light from the left. The linen has a subtle natural texture. The bottle's thick opaque golden-yellow liquid has a rich turmeric-ginger color. The overall mood is quiet, approachable, 'just the essentials.' This should feel like the start of something — not a big commitment, just a gentle beginning. The cream surface matches the card background it will sit in.

scene.background: clean cream-white surface (#FFFDF7), matching the card background
scene.surface: light natural linen napkin or cloth with subtle texture

subject.description: single zesty bottle upright on linen cloth, small ceramic bowl with lemon wedge and ginger piece beside it, minimal composition, lots of negative space
subject.position: slightly off-center right, bowl to the left

camera.depth_of_field: medium, bottle sharp, bowl slightly softer

style: minimal Scandinavian-clean product lifestyle, quiet and approachable, lots of breathing room
negative: no clutter, no multiple bottles, no dark tones, no text, no watermarks, no busy background, no dramatic lighting
